news.title:
Sanghvi Movers Ltd held a physical meeting with investors/analysts on March 23, 2026, discussing their operational overview.
No unpublished price-sensitive info was disclosed; an investor presentation is available on their website.
news.summary:
Sanghvi Movers Ltd held a physical meeting with investors/analysts on March 23, 2026, discussing their operational overview.
No unpublished price-sensitive info was disclosed; an investor presentation is available on their website.

news.title:
Sanghvi Movers Ltd to hold a virtual meeting with Electrum PMS on March 2, 2026.
Discussion will cover general business outlook; no unpublished sensitive info to be shared.
news.summary:
Sanghvi Movers Ltd to hold a virtual meeting with Electrum PMS on March 2, 2026.
Discussion will cover general business outlook; no unpublished sensitive info to be shared.

news.title:
Sanghvi Movers held its Q3 FY26 earnings call, highlighting robust order book of INR 1,860 Cr and utilization rates improving to 75-80%.
Saudi operations show promise with 3.5% yield; FY26 investments aim to drive FY27 margin normalization and long-term growth.
news.summary:
Sanghvi Movers held its Q3 FY26 earnings call, highlighting robust order book of INR 1,860 Cr and utilization rates improving to 75-80%.
Saudi operations show promise with 3.5% yield; FY26 investments aim to drive FY27 margin normalization and long-term growth.

news.title:
Sanghvi Movers Ltd shared audio recording of Q3 FY25 earnings call.
Recording link is available on their official website for stakeholders.
news.summary:
Sanghvi Movers Ltd shared audio recording of Q3 FY25 earnings call.
Recording link is available on their official website for stakeholders.

news.title:
Sanghvi Movers Ltd reports a negative financial trend in Dec 2025 quarter.
Despite 22.4% net sales growth in 6 months, profitability issues led to a downgrade to Sell.
news.summary:
Sanghvi Movers Ltd reports a negative financial trend in Dec 2025 quarter.
Despite 22.4% net sales growth in 6 months, profitability issues led to a downgrade to Sell.

news.title:
Sanghvi Movers' Q3 net profit fell to ₹290M from ₹331M YoY.
Q3 revenue rose to ₹2.36B from ₹2.1B YoY, showing growth.
news.summary:
Sanghvi Movers' Q3 net profit fell to ₹290M from ₹331M YoY.
Q3 revenue rose to ₹2.36B from ₹2.1B YoY, showing growth.

news.title:
Sanghvi Movers Ltd's Board meeting on Feb 6, 2026, will review Q3 and nine-month unaudited financials.
Trading window closed from Jan 1, 2026, until 48 hours post results announcement.
news.summary:
Sanghvi Movers Ltd's Board meeting on Feb 6, 2026, will review Q3 and nine-month unaudited financials.
Trading window closed from Jan 1, 2026, until 48 hours post results announcement.

news.title:
Inox Green won a LoA for 625 MWp solar O&M, expanding its portfolio to over 13 GW. Waaree Energies secured 210 MW DCR module orders in India and 2,000 MW in the US.
Sanghvi Movers gained a $4.3M international order, while Ashapuri Gold received Rs 29 crore orders from jewellery chains, strengthening their market positions.
news.summary:
Inox Green won a LoA for 625 MWp solar O&M, expanding its portfolio to over 13 GW. Waaree Energies secured 210 MW DCR module orders in India and 2,000 MW in the US.
Sanghvi Movers gained a $4.3M international order, while Ashapuri Gold received Rs 29 crore orders from jewellery chains, strengthening their market positions.

news.title: Sanghvi Movers secures $4.3M work order from Jindal Energy Botswana.
news.summary: Sanghvi Movers secures $4.3M work order from Jindal Energy Botswana.

news.title:
Sanghvi Movers Ltd disclosed under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR that M S K A & Associates converted to LLP.
The conversion, effective from January 13, 2026, has no impact on their role as statutory auditors.
news.summary:
Sanghvi Movers Ltd disclosed under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR that M S K A & Associates converted to LLP.
The conversion, effective from January 13, 2026, has no impact on their role as statutory auditors.

news.title:
Antony Waste gained a ₹330 cr Thane Municipal order, marking its 2nd win in a week.
GPT Infra secured ₹670 cr project; Saatvik Green Energy, Sanghvi Movers also won major orders.
news.summary:
Antony Waste gained a ₹330 cr Thane Municipal order, marking its 2nd win in a week.
GPT Infra secured ₹670 cr project; Saatvik Green Energy, Sanghvi Movers also won major orders.

news.title:
Sangreen Future Renewables, a Sanghvi Movers subsidiary, won ₹428.72 crore EPC wind BOP contracts for 270.6 MW.
Shares of Sanghvi Movers rose 4.9% to ₹345.30 on NSE post the order announcement.
news.summary:
Sangreen Future Renewables, a Sanghvi Movers subsidiary, won ₹428.72 crore EPC wind BOP contracts for 270.6 MW.
Shares of Sanghvi Movers rose 4.9% to ₹345.30 on NSE post the order announcement.

news.title: Sanghvi Movers' unit wins a major contract worth ₹4.29 billion.
news.summary: Sanghvi Movers' unit wins a major contract worth ₹4.29 billion.

news.title:
Sanghvi Movers Ltd will hold a virtual investor meeting on Dec 18, 2025.
The discussion will cover general business outlook with no unpublished sensitive information shared.
news.summary:
Sanghvi Movers Ltd will hold a virtual investor meeting on Dec 18, 2025.
The discussion will cover general business outlook with no unpublished sensitive information shared.

news.title:
Sanghvi Movers Ltd shares revised investor presentation for H1 FY26, detailing financial and operational performance.
Highlights include 483 Cr turnover, 87 Cr PAT, and global expansion initiatives in Saudi Arabia and GCC regions.
news.summary:
Sanghvi Movers Ltd shares revised investor presentation for H1 FY26, detailing financial and operational performance.
Highlights include 483 Cr turnover, 87 Cr PAT, and global expansion initiatives in Saudi Arabia and GCC regions.

news.title:
Sanghvi Movers Q2 profit rises to ₹363M vs ₹291M YoY; revenue up to ₹2.09B vs ₹1.56B YoY.
Q2 EBITDA grows to ₹808M vs ₹731M YoY, but EBITDA margin drops to 38.5% from 46.8% YoY.
news.summary:
Sanghvi Movers Q2 profit rises to ₹363M vs ₹291M YoY; revenue up to ₹2.09B vs ₹1.56B YoY.
Q2 EBITDA grows to ₹808M vs ₹731M YoY, but EBITDA margin drops to 38.5% from 46.8% YoY.

news.title:
Sanghvi Movers Ltd schedules a board meeting on Nov 7, 2025, to review Q2 and H1 FY25 financials.
Trading window closure started Oct 1, 2025, and ends 48 hours post-financial results release.
news.summary:
Sanghvi Movers Ltd schedules a board meeting on Nov 7, 2025, to review Q2 and H1 FY25 financials.
Trading window closure started Oct 1, 2025, and ends 48 hours post-financial results release.
